title: Ukraine Strikes Moscow Refinery in Large-Scale Drone Attack
summary_full: The attack, which shut down the capital’s airports for several hours, appeared to be the biggest wave of strikes on the city since the start of the war.
summary_public: The attack, which shut down the capital’s airports for several hours, appeared to be the biggest wave of strikes on the city since the start of the war.
